findings.description: The source table explicitly lists the non-minified (未ミニファイ) CSS files with their paths and × status for both environments: `/css/built/wide.css`, `/css/built/compact.css`, `/css/built/narrow.css`. These paths are absent from s5. While s4 notes these files are never used, an AI answering questions about the `/css/built/` directory contents would give incomplete information without these paths.
findings.source_evidence: Table row for ワイドモードスタイル: `/css/built/wide-minify.css` (○) and `/css/built/wide.css` (×); similarly for compact and narrow variants.
